summary.key_theme: Bloom Energy 正處於 AI 基礎設施電力需求帶來的長期成長潛力與短期供應鏈爭議及做空報告壓力之間的拉鋸戰。

bullish.title: Bloom Energy (BE) Lands $1.7 Billion Backing For Fuel Cells In AI Cloud Infrastructure
bullish.reason: 獲得 17 億美元資金支持用於 AI 雲端基礎設施，顯示市場對其燃料電池技術在 AI 資料中心電力解決方案中的需求具有高度信心。

bullish.title: Cramer Likes Applied Digital on the Dip — but Warns: 'Start It Small, Don't Start It Big' — Cramer likes APLD, but advises starting small due to losses. He also recommends buying BE as a non-combustible power source
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 推薦買入 BE，將其定位為非燃燒型電力來源，有助於提升投資人信心。

bullish.title: Alternative Power Demand Drives Bloom Energy (BE) Higher
bullish.reason: ClearBridge Investments 在第二季評論中強調替代能源需求推動了 Bloom Energy 的成長，反映機構投資人對其長期基本面的認可。

bullish.title: This Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Tuesday
bullish.reason: 分析師啟動對 BE 的研究覆蓋並給予看漲評級，為股價提供正面情緒支撐。

bearish.title: Bloom Energy (BE) Is Down 9.7% After Scandium Supply Dispute And $25B AI Power Deal Expansion
bearish.reason: 涉及鈧 (Scandium) 供應爭議，直接引發市場對其生產穩定性的擔憂，導致股價單日顯著下跌。

bearish.title: BE Stock Alert: Bloom Energy Stock Remains In Focus Following Short Report, Rebuttal
bearish.reason: Hunterbrook 發布的做空報告對公司造成持續性壓力，儘管公司有進行反駁，但市場仍處於觀望與修正階段。

bearish.title: Bloom Energy (BE) Stock Drops Despite Market Gains: Important Facts to Note
bearish.reason: 在市場整體上漲背景下，BE 股價表現疲軟，顯示投資人對近期負面消息的消化尚未結束。

neutral.title: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage of Bloom Energy (BE) with Hold Recommendation
neutral.reason: Truist Securities 給予持有評級，顯示分析師在多空消息交雜下採取保守觀望態度。

neutral.title: Is Bloom Energy Corporation (NYSE:BE) among the 8 Best Stocks to Buy Following Federal Reserve Pivot Expectations?
neutral.reason: 探討聯準會政策轉向對 BE 的潛在影響，屬於宏觀環境分析，對個股短期影響有限。
